purpose: A custom JavaFX control that displays a single character from a predefined set (letters A-Z, numbers 0-9, and a hyphen). It supports toggling between characters using mouse or touch interactions and integrates with ToggleGroup for selection management. It also features a blinking animation when selected.

return_value.description: Initializes the graphics context for the InitialDigit control
Registers listeners for mouse, touch, and resize events
Returns the current character displayed by the InitialDigit control
Returns the current font color of the InitialDigit control

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: The new font color to be set

return_value.description: Sets the font color of the InitialDigit control
Decrements the character index to display the previous character
Increments the character index to display the next character

methods.code: public ToggleGroup getToggleGroup() { return null == toggleGroup ? null : toggleGroupProperty().get(); }

return_value.description: Returns the ToggleGroup this InitialDigit belongs to

methods.code: public void setToggleGroup(final ToggleGroup toggleGroup) { toggleGroupProperty().set(toggleGroup); }

return_value.description: Sets the ToggleGroup for this InitialDigit
Returns the ObjectProperty for the ToggleGroup
Returns whether this InitialDigit is selected

methods.code: public void setSelected(final boolean selected) { this.selected.set(selected); }

parameters.name: selected
parameters.description: Whether this InitialDigit should be selected

return_value.description: Sets the selected state of this InitialDigit
Returns the BooleanProperty for the selected state
Clamps the value between min and max
Resizes the canvas and redraws the content
Draws the current character on the canvas
